title: Claude Code Leak: What's Happening?
summary: A YouTube discussion analyzing how Claude Code source code leaked through an NPM map file, examining Anthropic's TypeScript infrastructure, three-layer memory system, token economics, privacy concerns, and legal implications around AI-generated code copyright. The host argues that leaked open-source implementations represent a shift toward builder independence from proprietary platforms.
